text: There you are, Telvar. Step inside—doors keep secrets better than hallways.
speaker: Myramar

text: Before the council, remember your place: Rutilus is the floor you stand on, not the ceiling you own. Veneficturis rewards the obedient apprentice.
speaker: Myramar

text: The Test of Fire is not a rumor for children's ears. It is a ledger—names chosen early, debts counted late.
speaker: Myramar

text: If you are clever, you will practice what I gave you: clean lines, quiet breath, and no theatrics. The city watches Secundus; Secundus watches you.
speaker: Myramar

text: Go. Sharpen your focus—not your tongue.
speaker: Myramar

text: Myramar's desk is almost insultingly neat: sealed letters, a rack of crimson wax, and a single folded note pinned beneath a brass weight.
speaker: Narrator

text: You ease the weight aside. The paper is a roster titled 'Secundus — Advanced Ordeal Candidates (Act II onward)'. The ink is tidy, official, and cruelly plain.
speaker: Narrator

text: Halfway down the column your stomach drops: Telvar Orsson — sponsored (Myramar, Rutilus). Your name sits on the list like it was always meant to be there.
speaker: Narrator

text: He… wrote me in. Before I even understood what 'candidate' meant.
speaker: Telvar

text: You slide the note back exactly as it was. Some truths read louder when nobody knows you've read them.
speaker: Narrator
